title: Bread Ahead Creme Patissiere Filling
method: Slit vanilla pod open lengthways and scrape out the seeds
Put seeds, pod and milk into a heavy-based saucepan and bring slowly to the boil, to infuse the vanilla
Meanwhile, place egg yolks and 125g sugar into a bowl, and whisk together for a few seconds, then sift in the flour and mix together

Pour boiling milk over the yolk mixture, whisking constantly to prevent curdling, then return the mixture to the saucepan and cook over a medium heat, whisking constantly for ~3 mins until nice and thick
Pass through a fine sieve, then place a sheet of cling film on the surface of the custard to prevent a skin forming (keep vanilla pod for reuse)
Leave custard to cool, then put into fridge
Whip the cream and remaining 60g sugar together until thick and fold into the chilled custard. Now ready to pipe!
notes: Recipe comes from the bread ahead doughnut workshop
Use as a creme patissiere filling for bread ahead doughnuts
